input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 1.1.5 tests reference org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor/TypedProps, which are absent from pekko-actor_2.13 2.0.0-M1; this is an API-removal/test-update issue, not missing setup.
Do not add pekko-actor-typed_2.13 just to repair those imports: it provides the newer org.apache.pekko.actor.typed API, not the removed classic TypedActor API.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Apache Pekko actor 2.0.0-M1 is a standalone classic actor artifact with only scala-library and typesafe-config as normal resolved dependencies; meaningful coverage is reachable by exercising classic ActorSystem/Props/AbstractActor/event/serialization APIs without Docker, extra Maven dependencies, or required environment/system properties.
